3161170.name: Arya's Blade
3161170.description:
In a world that has seen humanity rise and fall countless times, take on the role of Divya in a story to find the hope for survival of her tribe.

Journey across landscapes, filled with remnants of time passed, trying to understand a world that seems too bizarre to be real.

Key Features —

Arya's Blade is a Metroidvania-style, fast-paced hack-and-slash game with physics-based combat and platforming. 

  • Unlock Divya's full potential by exploiting her speed, agility, and momentum to leave a devastating impact on your foes.

  • Platforming is not just about timing in Arya's Blade. Use your momentum and exploit physics to overcome challenges that seem impossible otherwise.

  • Gain a deep understanding of your own capabilities and of the world and master a broad skillset to ensure your survival.

  • Come across people who will leave an everlasting impact on your story, shaping it together with you.

  • Encounter variety of flora and fauna, encountering a wide range of foes. Vanquish them to continue your journey.

  • In an interconnected world, sometimes in space but others in time, be the hope for the survival of your tribe.

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
